knifeDuelsBeginnerGuide.title: Knife Duels Beginner Guide
knifeDuelsBeginnerGuide.intro: New players can follow this guide to understand the basics of Knife Duels. From joining matches to improving timing and movement, these steps cover the most important skills for beginners.

steps.title: Join Your First Match
steps.description: Enter a 1v1 or Free-For-All lobby and learn the arena layout before focusing on winning.

steps.title: Learn Basic Knife Attacks
steps.description: Use your primary attack to practice swing timing, spacing, and landing hits safely.

steps.title: Master Dodging Movement
steps.description: Move sideways, jump, and reposition frequently to avoid predictable enemy attacks.

steps.title: Practice Blocking and Counters
steps.description: Use defensive timing to block attacks and create opportunities for counter strikes.

steps.title: Unlock Better Knives
steps.description: Complete matches, collect rewards, and unlock new knives or skins to improve your collection.

quickTips: Stay mobile — standing still makes you an easy target in every duel.
Learn attack ranges so you can strike first without overcommitting.
Mix up your movement patterns to keep opponents guessing.
Spend rewards on knives that match your preferred combat style.

knifeDuelsWeaponsTierList.title: Knife Duels Weapons Tier List
knifeDuelsWeaponsTierList.intro: This tier list organizes common Knife Duels weapon types by their effectiveness in close-range PvP combat. Faster weapons usually reward skilled timing, while heavier weapons deliver stronger hits.

items.description: Fast attack speed with excellent range, making it strong for skilled duel players.
High mobility weapon with quick animations and strong outplay potential.
Very fast weapon that excels in aggressive close-range fights.
Balanced damage and range option suitable for most players.
Heavy hitting weapon with slower attacks but reliable damage.
Starter weapon with simple mechanics but fewer combat advantages.

knifeDuelsGameplayGuide.title: Knife Duels Gameplay Guide
knifeDuelsGameplayGuide.intro: Knife Duels is a fast-paced Roblox PvP experience focused on close-range knife combat. Players compete across different modes while improving skills, collecting weapons, and earning rewards.

items.rules: Two players fight in a private arena. The first player to eliminate the opponent wins the round.
items.strategy: Focus on timing attacks, reading enemy movement, and controlling distance.

items.rules: Multiple players battle simultaneously until the winner reaches the objective score.
items.strategy: Avoid crowded fights and attack opponents when they are vulnerable.

items.rules: Players are divided into teams and compete for eliminations together.
items.strategy: Coordinate attacks and support teammates during fights.

items.rules: Practice combat mechanics without competitive pressure.
items.strategy: Improve aim, movement, attack timing, and defensive reactions.

knifeDuelsControlsGuide.title: Knife Duels Controls Guide
knifeDuelsControlsGuide.intro: This guide explains the main keyboard, mouse, and mobile controls used in Knife Duels. New players can quickly learn how to move, attack, dodge, and defend before entering competitive matches.

items.usage: Use quick clicks to strike opponents during close-range combat
Move faster to chase enemies or escape dangerous situations
Jump over attacks and improve movement options during fights
Reduce incoming damage and create opportunities for counter attacks
Tap the attack button to perform melee strikes

knifeDuelsUpdateHistory.title: Knife Duels Update History
knifeDuelsUpdateHistory.intro: This timeline helps returning players understand important changes, new weapons, and gameplay improvements introduced through Knife Duels updates.

knifeDuelsTipsAndTricks.title: Knife Duels Tips and Tricks
knifeDuelsTipsAndTricks.intro: Winning in Knife Duels requires more than fast attacks. These tips help players understand spacing, timing, movement, and common mistakes that reduce their chances of winning.

items.title: Control Your Distance
items.description: Stay at the edge of attack range to bait enemy swings and create counter attack opportunities.

items.title: Learn Attack Timing
items.description: Avoid random button mashing and attack when opponents finish their movement or miss a strike.

items.title: Use Movement Advantage
items.description: Combine jumping, strafing, and sprinting to make yourself harder to hit.

items.title: Watch Enemy Patterns
items.description: Study repeated attack habits and predict when opponents will attack or dodge.

items.title: Avoid Open Fighting Areas
items.description: Use positioning and map objects to limit enemy movement options.

items.title: Practice Before Ranked Matches
items.description: Use training or casual fights to improve mechanics before competitive battles.

knifeDuelsCommunityLinks.intro: The Knife Duels community provides places for players to discover announcements, share strategies, and stay updated with new content releases.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Knife Duels

questions.question: What is Knife Duels on Roblox?
questions.answer: Knife Duels is a fast-paced Roblox PvP game focused on close-range knife combat across modes like 1v1, Free-For-All, and Team Duels.

questions.question: Where can I play Knife Duels?
questions.answer: You can play Knife Duels directly on Roblox through the official game page on any supported device.

questions.question: How do I redeem Knife Duels codes?
questions.answer: Open the code redemption menu inside Knife Duels, enter an active code, and claim your free coins, skins, and boosts.

questions.question: Is Knife Duels free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Knife Duels is free to play on Roblox, with optional cosmetics and boosts available through gameplay and codes.

questions.question: What are the best knives in Knife Duels?
questions.answer: Fast weapons like the Katana and Butterfly Knife rank highest in the Knife Duels tier list thanks to their speed and range.

questions.question: Does Knife Duels get regular updates?
questions.answer: Yes. Knife Duels receives updates that add new knives, skins, balance changes, and limited-time rewards.

guide.whatIs: What is the Knife Duels Guide?
guide.whatIsDescription: The Knife Duels guide covers everything you need to play well: first-time setup, controls for PC and mobile, how to throw knives, movement, and the core combat mechanics that decide every duel.

whySteps.step1Description: Master PC and mobile inputs for attacking, moving, and aiming so reactions become instinct
whySteps.step2Description: Practice aiming, leading targets, and timing throws to land consistent hits
whySteps.step3Description: Apply movement, spacing, and counter-attack strategies to climb the leaderboard

whySteps.step2Description: Learn which knife rarities hold the most value for shop purchases and trades

crosshair.whatIs: What is the Knife Duels Crosshair?
crosshair.whatIsDescription: The Knife Duels crosshair is the on-screen reticle that shows where your throws will land. Players can switch crosshairs using shared crosshair IDs or create a custom crosshair for better aiming.

whySteps.step1Description: Pick a reticle shape and color that stands out against the arena background
whySteps.step2Description: Import popular crosshair codes from other players with a single ID
whySteps.step3Description: Fine-tune size, thickness, and gap to match your throwing style

whySteps.step2Description: Switch knives and strategies based on whether you face a gun, sniper, or another knife
